name: Feature request

---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or API you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you prefer your proposal (if any).

## Additional context

Mockups, links to related issues, OperatorHub/Helm impact, etc.
